summary: Completed testing of subscription gating feature for signup/login flows. All features working correctly: (1) Signup without subscription returns 403 and shows subscription popup with PricingSection. (2) Admin login works without subscription checks. (3) Wrong credentials return 401 (not 403). (4) Subscription popup has working close button. (5) Landing page with ?no_subscription=true scrolls to pricing section.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Subscription gating feature fully tested. Backend returns 403 for signup/login without subscription. Frontend shows subscription popup with PricingSection on 403 errors. Admin login is exempt from subscription checks. Landing page ?no_subscription=true parameter scrolls to pricing section.

subscription_gating_signup.description: Signup without subscription shows popup instead of just toast
subscription_gating_signup.verification: Tested signup with nosub_test@example.com - 403 returned, popup with PricingSection displayed

subscription_gating_login.description: Login for parent without subscription returns 403
subscription_gating_login.verification: Backend returns 403 for parent users without active subscription

admin_exempt.description: Admin login exempt from subscription checks
admin_exempt.verification: Admin login with admin@learnersplanet.com works and redirects to /admin

no_subscription_redirect.description: Google OAuth redirect with no_subscription=true shows toast and scrolls to pricing
no_subscription_redirect.verification: Landing page scrolls to pricing section (scroll position 3743px)
